currentCorrectText: They are falling in a vacuum
evidence: In a vacuum, all bodies fall with the same acceleration due to gravity (g) regardless of their mass or weight.

subject: Physics
question: In NMR spectroscopy, the spinning nuclei in a strong magnetic field must be irradiated by which of t
suggestedCorrectText: Radio frequency radiation perpendicular to the magnetic field.
evidence: NMR requires an oscillating radio frequency field applied perpendicular to the static magnetic field to induce transitions.
